# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:
  MySQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600 # (10 days)
      VisibilityTimeout: 300 # (5 minutes)

  MySNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref MySQSQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Sid: AllowAccessToMySNSTopic
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:GetMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility

  Subscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref MySNSTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Arn

Outputs:
  QueueURL:
    Value: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Arn
    Description: SQS Queue URL

  SNSARN:
    Value: !Ref MySNSTopic
    Description: SNS Topic ARN
